query.original: What is the movement speed of a Giant Eagle?
query.used: What is the movement speed of a Giant Eagle in Dungeons & Dragons 5th Edition?

retrieved_nodes.preview: In Dungeons & Dragons 5th Edition, a Giant Eagle has a movement speed of 10 feet on the ground and 80 feet when flying. It is classified as a Large beast with an Armor Class of 13 and 26 hit points (4

answer: A Giant Eagle in Dungeons & Dragons 5th Edition has a movement speed of 10 feet on the ground and 80 feet when flying.
